tasks.prompt: Create a simple Python project in the current directory. Create: 1) main.py with a Flask hello-world app that has routes for / (returns 'Hello World') and /health (returns JSON {"status": "ok"}), 2) requirements.txt with flask, 3) a tests/ directory with test_main.py that tests both routes using Flask's test client. Make sure all files are complete and working.

Create a README.md for this project. Include: project name 'Hello Demo', a brief description, how to install dependencies (pip install -r requirements.txt), how to run the app (python main.py), and how to run tests (python -m pytest tests/).
Create a Dockerfile for this Flask app. Use python:3.12-slim as base, copy requirements.txt first and install deps, then copy the rest of the code. Expose port 5000 and set the CMD to run main.py.
